zh.title: 值得留下来的 Prompt
zh.subtitle: 帮助我做技术判断、项目启动、想法整理和外包沟通。这些 Prompt 在真实场景中被反复使用后留下来。
zh.meta: 帮助我做技术判断、项目启动、想法整理和外包沟通。这些 Prompt 在真实场景中被反复使用后留下来。

en.title: Prompts worth keeping.
en.subtitle: Used for technical decisions, project kickoff, idea exploration, and client communication. These are the prompts that survived repeated real-world use.
en.meta: Used for technical decisions, project kickoff, idea exploration, and client communication. These are the prompts that survived repeated real-world use.

zh.label: 关于 PromptForge
zh.text: 大多数 Prompt 解决一次问题后就会被忘记。这里保留下来的，是那些我仍然会复制、修改并继续使用的 Prompt。目前公开 5 个 Prompt，其余内容仍处于 review 状态。

en.label: About PromptForge
en.text: Most prompts are forgotten after solving a problem once. The ones here are still being copied, adapted, and used today. Five prompts are currently public. The rest remain in review.

zh.title: 我仍然会使用的 Prompt
zh.description: 每个入口对应一个反复出现的真实场景，而不是一个需要覆盖的分类。

en.title: The prompts I still return to
en.description: Each entry maps to a recurring real-world situation, not a category that needed filling.

zh.title: Tech Lead 技术判断
zh.description: 进入 GPT + Codex 协作前，先判断方案、边界、风险和最小执行路径。

en.title: Tech Lead Agent
en.description: Before GPT + Codex execution, judge the solution, scope, risks, and smallest implementation path.

zh.title: 技术协作
zh.description: 用于 AI 编码前的项目边界、目录、文档、数据库、测试和部署准备。

en.title: Technical Collaboration
en.description: For project scope, repositories, docs, database assumptions, tests, and deployment readiness before AI coding.

zh.title: 外包 / 接单
zh.description: 用于甲方沟通、需求边界、报价工期、验收售后和范围控制。

en.title: Freelance & Client Work
en.description: For client communication, scope boundaries, pricing, timelines, acceptance, and support.

zh.title: 内容创作
zh.description: 用于选题、标题、短文案、社交平台内容和创作流程。

en.title: Content Creation
en.description: For topics, titles, short copy, social posts, and repeatable content workflows.

zh.title: 个人效率
zh.description: 用于学习计划、英语聊天、日常决策和个人工作流。

en.title: Personal Productivity
en.description: For learning plans, English practice, daily decisions, and personal workflows.

zh.title: AI 协作方法
zh.description: 用于 GPT 与 Codex 的分工、任务拆分、审查和执行规范。

en.title: AI Collaboration Methods
en.description: For GPT and Codex roles, task framing, review, and execution rules.

zh.title: Agent 与 AI 工程方法论
zh.description: 用于沉淀可复用的 AI 系统工程方法，覆盖方法验证、失败归因与可交付闭环。

en.title: Agent & AI Engineering Methods
en.description: For reusable AI engineering methods focused on verifiable facts, failure attribution, and practical delivery loops.
